data.keyword: salt therapy equipment suppliers for day spa

result.keyword: salt therapy equipment suppliers for day spa

items.markdown:
For day spas looking to integrate salt therapy (halotherapy), several industry-leading suppliers provide professional-grade equipment ranging from standalone booths to full salt room conversions.[[1]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/industries/medical-and-day-spas)

Top Professional Suppliers & Manufacturers

The following companies are the primary providers for commercial spa environments in 2026:

- **[Halotherapy Solutions](https://halotherapysolutions.com/)** : Recognized as one of the world's largest providers, they offer a wide range of equipment including the **HaloFX™ Halogenerator** (approx. $6,500) and the **[HaloSTAR™](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:16782830647690521193,headlineOfferDocid:10680378767736738884,productDocid:10680378767736738884&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwixyojj-6OTAxX4VaQEHbtDCqYQxa4PegQIBhAE)** entry-level salt chamber. They are known for providing lifetime warranties on halogenerators and comprehensive business support.
- **[SALT Chamber Inc.](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/)** : An industry pioneer with over 3,600 installations worldwide. They provide ISO-certified equipment, including the **SALT FX® Pro** halogenerator for rooms up to 450 sq. ft.. They also offer turnkey solutions and have been exclusive vendors for major spa brands like Woodhouse Spas.
- **HaloSpa USA** : Focuses on medical-grade halogenerators like the **HaloVita™ Pro** , designed for fitness and wellness centers requiring low-maintenance operation. They also provide consulting and construction services for salt rooms.
- **[Halomed](http://www.halomedsaltroom.com/)** : A global name specializing in controlled dry salt aerosol technology. They offer professional-grade halogenerators and have equipped over 8,000 salt rooms worldwide.
- **[Spa Vision](https://www.spavision.com/category/Biohacking%20&%20Touchless%20Therapies/Halotherapy%20%26%20Salt)** : A global spa equipment supplier that distributes various salt therapy brands, including ISO Benessere and Living Earth Crafts.[[1]](https://www.spavision.com/category/Biohacking%20&%20Touchless%20Therapies/Halotherapy%20%26%20Salt#:~:text=Halotherapy%20&%20Salt%20%7C%20Spa%20Vision%20%7C,By%20Oakworks)[[2]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/ourproducts/#:~:text=LARGEST%20SELECTION,Portable%20Salt%20Therapy)[[3]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/salt-therapy-halotherapy-for-businesses/)[[4]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/#:~:text=Technical%20Expertise,Trusted%20by%203%2C600+%20satisfied%20clients:)[[5]](https://saltdecor.com/salt-fx-halogenerators/#:~:text=Project%20Description,ft.)[[6]](https://www.halogenerators.com/fx-pro/#:~:text=FX%C2%AE%20PRO,RH%2C%20700-1060%20hPa.)[[7]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/exclusive-vendor-woodhouse-spas#:~:text=ABOUT%20SALT%20CHAMBER,visit%20www.saltchamberinc.com.)[[8]](https://halospausa.com/halogenerators-products/#:~:text=HaloSpa%20is%20located%20outside%20of,Halogenerators%20Guarantee%20What%20They%20Do!)[[9]](https://halospausa.com/salt-therapy-rooms-scottsdale-arizona/#:~:text=Arizona%20Salt%20Room%20Builder%20and%20Supplier&text=Now%2C%20HaloSpa%20USA%20is%20committed,to%20the%20next%20level%20quickly.)[[10]](http://www.halomedsaltroom.com/#:~:text=Halomed%20halogenerators%20and%20salt%20rooms,rooms%20all%20around%20the%20world.)[[11]](https://www.spavision.com/category/Biohacking%20&%20Touchless%20Therapies/Halotherapy%20%26%20Salt#:~:text=Halo%20Compact,By%20Kurland)

Essential Equipment Types for Spas

Spas typically choose between these three main categories of equipment:

| Equipment Type[[1]](https://www.spavision.com/category/Biohacking%20&%20Touchless%20Therapies/Halotherapy%20%26%20Salt#:~:text=Halotherapy%20&%20Salt%20%7C%20Spa%20Vision%20%7C,By%20Oakworks)[[2]](https://www.sotesarasota.com/salt-therapy-equipment#:~:text=Halo%20Booth%20Pro,with%20a%205-year%20warranty.)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17898511261951177925&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7231963534475184101&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6557729963456802670&ibp=oshop) | Description | Estimated Price |
|---|---|---|
| **Halogenerators** | The core machine that crushes and disperses salt aerosol. | $6,500+ |
| **Salt Booths/Cabins** | Small, self-contained units for private 15-20 minute sessions. | Varies by size |
| **Salt Treatment Tables** | Heated Himalayan salt beds for massage or relaxation. | ~$15,740 - $15,890 |
| **Salt Decor** | Warmed salt walls or stone warmers to enhance ambiance. | $629 - $6,290 |

Key Product Highlights

[![Atlas Flex-Block & Ion Salt Table by TouchAmerica White / Granular](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161009-4353-0139-0000-4df845da105b:6)
Atlas Flex-Block & Ion Salt Table by TouchAmerica White / Granular $15,890.00 Pure Spa Direct](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:12865283134943884178,headlineOfferDocid:17898511261951177925,productDocid:17898511261951177925&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwixyojj-6OTAxX4VaQEHbtDCqYQgLcPegQICxAC) Ask about A high-end treatment table by TouchAmerica featuring motorized height adjustment and a solid Himalayan salt surface.

[![Saltability Himalayan Salt Massage Stone Warmer Poly-Carbonite Bowl](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161009-4353-0139-0000-4df845da105b:7)
Saltability Himalayan Salt Massage Stone Warmer Poly-Carbonite Bowl $669.95 Universal Companies 4.8 (5)](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:15682380368065365737,headlineOfferDocid:6557729963456802670,productDocid:6557729963456802670,rds:PC_4548154486553231692%7CPROD_PC_4548154486553231692&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwixyojj-6OTAxX4VaQEHbtDCqYQgLcPegQICxAM) Ask about An eco-friendly polycarbonate bowl that warms Himalayan salt stones for massage treatments (approx. $630 - $670).

[![Living Earth Crafts ZG Salt Room Dream Lounger](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161009-4353-0139-0000-4df845da105b:8)
Living Earth Crafts ZG Salt Room Dream Lounger $4,850.00 Universal Companies](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:8389309065792502932,headlineOfferDocid:4668630399059021190,productDocid:4668630399059021190&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwixyojj-6OTAxX4VaQEHbtDCqYQgLcPegQICxAX) Ask about Specialized seating designed to withstand corrosive salt environments (approx. $4,650).[[1]](https://www.spavision.com/category/Biohacking%20&%20Touchless%20Therapies/Halotherapy%20%26%20Salt#:~:text=Halotherapy%20&%20Salt%20%7C%20Spa%20Vision%20%7C,By%20Oakworks)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17898511261951177925&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6557729963456802670&ibp=oshop)
